experiences.title: Scuba Diving
experiences.description: Dive into crystal-clear waters and explore vibrant coral reefs alongside experienced guides.

experiences.title: 2. Watersports
experiences.description: Have some fun on the water with activities like jet skiing, paddleboarding, and kayaking.

experiences.title: Dolphin Cruise
experiences.description: Sail at golden hour alongside spinner dolphins in their natural Maldivian habitat.

experiences.title: Island Hopping
experiences.description: Chart a course through remote atolls, local fishing villages and pristine beaches.

experiences.title: Deck Wellness
experiences.description: Sunrise yoga, in-cabin massages and wellness rituals designed for total rejuvenation.

experiences.title: Stargazing at Sea
experiences.description: Far from city lights, experience some of the world's most breathtaking night skies.
